summary: Completed Iteration 11 UI refactor validation testing for ferris wheel/menu issues. All requested features verified working: side workspace menu with Settings link, mode switching (Chat/Scene/Cascade/Batch), render mode toggle (MD/RAW), and carousel navigation with prev/next buttons (no vertical wheel scrolling).

issues: Carousel prev/next buttons work but are missing explicit data-testid attributes (found via lucide icons). Consider adding data-testid='carousel-prev-btn' and data-testid='carousel-next-btn'

action_items: Minor: Add data-testid attributes to carousel prev/next buttons for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: Menu button correctly positioned at top-left with data-testid='chat-menu-trigger-btn'
Side workspace menu opens with Settings link (data-testid='workspace-go-settings-btn') at bottom navigation section
Mode switching buttons (Chat/Scene/Cascade/Batch) correctly placed in side menu with proper data-testids
When mode is scene/cascade/batch, workspace panel expands and shows mode-specific controls
When mode is chat, response panels and input are visible as expected
Render mode toggle (MD/RAW) correctly switches between 'markdown' and 'native' modes
Carousel uses handleCarouselWheel which checks Math.abs(event.deltaX) >= Math.abs(event.deltaY) - correctly ignores vertical scrolling
Carousel prev/next navigation works with click handlers - uses handlePrevModel/handleNextModel
ResponseMessageContent correctly renders 'Native text' badge when renderMode='native'
No runtime crashes observed during UI testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user accounts via registration flow for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 UI refactor validation complete. All features working: (1) Menu button at top-left opens side workspace menu with OpenAI-style navigation. Settings link present at bottom of menu. (2) Mode switching from side menu works - Chat/Scene/Cascade/Batch buttons update activeTopTab correctly. (3) When mode is not 'chat', workspace panel expands with mode-specific controls; Scene shows global context/per-model settings, Cascade shows rounds/order config, Batch shows 'Open batch runner'. (4) When mode is 'chat', response panels with model badges and carousel are visible. (5) Render mode toggle correctly switches between MD (markdown rendering) and RAW (native text display). (6) Carousel navigation works via prev/next button clicks. handleCarouselWheel filters out vertical scrolling (checks deltaX vs deltaY). (7) No runtime crashes in ChatPage. Minor recommendation: add data-testid to carousel prev/next buttons.
